caption:
Every lead you lost this month left a trail.

Most owners guess why a lead didn't book. Run this 4-checkpoint autopsy on your last 10 lost leads instead.

1. Did the ad get seen and clicked?

2. Did someone respond within 5 minutes?

3. How many follow-ups happened before your team gave up?

4. Did they book, then never hear from you again?

Wherever the trail goes cold is the system to fix first.

DM "AUTOPSY" and Black Arrow will map where your leads are dying.

#LeadFollowUp #ServiceBusiness #SpeedToLead #HomeServiceMarketing #CRMAutomation
rationale: Authority/Frameworks is the most under-served category this cycle, and this turns Black Arrow's four systems into a forensic diagnostic an owner runs on real lost leads, distinct from the self-scoring mental model already shipped.
